name: Chocolate Truffle Raspberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
CRUST
1. Mix nuts, crushed cookies, sugar and melted butter.
2. Pat mixture into bottom and sides of 10-inch springform pan.
3. Set aside.
CAKE
1. Unwrap cream cheese and soften in microwave for 2 minutes on high power.
2. After cracking eggs, warm in microwave for 25 seconds.
3. Strain preserves to remove all seeds and fruit pieces.
4. Beat cheese until light and fluffy.
5. Add sugar and beat again.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
7. Stir in heavy cream, cornstarch, and liqueur.
8. Pour into pan and bake at 375 degrees for 45 minutes (put pan of water on bottom rack while baking and preheating).
9. Cake is done when edges are lightly brown and firm and center is still soft.
10. Loosen edges from pan and let cool for about 2 hours or so.
11. Spread raspberry preserves on top of cake.
12. Make ganache by combining all ingredients in a bowl.
13. Pipe ganache around the edges using a large star tip.
14. Dot top of cake with fresh raspberries.
